_meta.description: Index of Amazon SP-API on-demand report DOCUMENT schemas. Load this first, then read reference/<file> for the exact reportOptions enums and the full field tree of the returned document.
_meta.reuse_via: sp_api_search_reports (find an existing DONE report before creating a new one)
_meta.note: These are on-demand analytics / Brand Analytics / Vendor reports returned as JSON documents. For the synced rpt_* warehouse + create/poll/download workflow, see the report-data skill.
_meta.inferred_reportTypes_note: reportType for accountHealthReport, b2bProductOpportunitiesNotYetOnAmazon, and b2bProductOpportunitiesRecommendedForYou is NOT carried in the bundled schema example — the values shown are inferred from Amazon's Reports API reportType list. Confirm against sp_api_search_reports / Amazon docs before relying on them. The DOCUMENT field schemas in those files are authoritative regardless.
_meta.duplicate_reportType_note: GET_COUPON_PERFORMANCE_REPORT appears twice: sellerCouponReport (reportOptions couponStartDateFrom/To, seller) vs vendorCouponReport (campaignStartDateFrom/To, vendor). Pick the schema matching your account type.
